---
title: "LA Predictive Policing"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
source(here::here("scripts", "_dashboard-plots.R"))
m <- readRDS(here::here("data", "processed", "dashboard-data.rds"))
dashboard_data <- m$dashboard_data
year_min <- m$year_min
year_max <- m$year_max
```

# Map

## Row

```{r}
#| title: !expr paste0("Crimes per Year by Tract (", year_min, "–", year_max, ")")
leaflet::leafletOutput("crime_map")
```

# Analysis

## Row

```{r}
#| title: Crimes per Year vs. % Black + Hispanic by Tract
plotOutput("race_scatter")
```

```{r}
#| title: Racial Distribution of Low-, Mid-, and High-Crime Tracts
radioButtons("crime_tier", label = NULL,
  choices = c("Low", "Mid", "High"),
  selected = "High", inline = TRUE
)
plotOutput("racial_dist")
```

```{r}
#| context: server
output$race_scatter <- renderPlot({
  plot_crime_by_race(dashboard_data)
})

output$crime_map <- leaflet::renderLeaflet({
  plot_crime_counts(dashboard_data)
})

output$racial_dist <- renderPlot({
  plot_racial_distribution(dashboard_data, tier = input$crime_tier)
})
```
